overall.description: First-person motorcycle driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a futuristic neon-lit city at dawn. The player rides a red decal-covered motorcycle through multi-lane streets, under elevated highways, and past towering skyscrapers with prominent holographic billboards. The scene features moderate vehicle traffic and transitions between open boulevards and covered underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach to city center

events.description: passing under first major overpass structure entering urban canyon
approaching first intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle with white decals, accelerating along multi-lane highway toward the distant skyscraper

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in left lane

concrete overpass spanning the road ahead
safety barrier along the right side of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway approach to a futuristic city center, with the camera driving toward a distant mega-skyscraper. The road is flanked by concrete barriers and elevated highway structures. The player accelerates the red motorcycle under overpasses, approaching the denser urban area with sparse traffic visible in adjacent lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with neon signage and palm trees

events.description: entering area with prominent pink and purple neon billboards on building facades
navigating right turn at intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through city traffic, turning at intersections and navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with pink neon advertisement
row of palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard
dark tunnel entrance approaching in the distance
modern glass facade building with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a denser commercial district with neon-lit buildings and palm tree-lined streets. The player navigates through moderate traffic, passing large digital billboards and turning at intersections. The environment transitions from highway infrastructure to urban boulevards with glass commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed tunnel and open boulevard with underpasses

events.description: entering covered tunnel section with artificial ceiling lighting
exiting tunnel into brighter open street with visible sky

agents.ego_description: cruising through alternating tunnel sections and open palm-lined boulevards, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
linear fluorescent lights along the tunnel ceiling
large holographic advertisement display on building
pedestrian or vehicle overpass spanning the road

segments.scene_description: This segment features alternating between covered tunnel sections and open boulevards. The motorcycle passes through underpasses with artificial lighting before emerging into areas with palm trees and large digital billboards. The road features distinctive yellow markings and the environment maintains a mix of natural dawn light and artificial neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with tunnels and corporate signage

events.description: entering long tunnel section with Delamain corporate signage overhead
exiting tunnel into bright intersection with heavy neon signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban traffic, weaving between vehicles in tunnels and open intersections

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving in the right lane

entered.detail: illuminated corporate sign for Delamain spanning across the road
large multi-panel digital billboard with animated advertisements
blue illuminated strips embedded in the road surface
hanging digital traffic sign with glowing text

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through the densest urban areas, featuring long tunnels with corporate signage and heavy vehicle traffic. The motorcycle navigates past a green sports car and exits into bright intersections with massive holographic billboards. Blue illuminated road markings and overhead digital displays dominate the futuristic cityscape as the drive continues through the neon-lit canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ride that transitions from a stark elevated highway into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins with the red motorcycle accelerating along a concrete highway approach, driving under massive overpasses toward a distant mega-skyscraper. As the camera moves forward, the industrial infrastructure of the highway gradually gives way to a denser urban environment. The scene then shifts into a commercial boulevard where the concrete barriers are replaced by glass buildings and palm tree-lined streets. Finally, the ride weaves through moderate traffic and past towering digital billboards as the surroundings fully transform into a glowing city center.

The shot follows a continuous ride through a futuristic cityscape that transitions from alternating open boulevards into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by weaving between covered underpasses with artificial lighting and open stretches lined with palm trees and large digital billboards under the soft glow of dawn. As the motorcycle accelerates, the environment shifts toward a more industrial urban core, passing through long tunnels adorned with corporate signage amidst heavy vehicle traffic. The scene then opens into bright, wide intersections where the camera navigates past a green sports car and under massive holographic billboards. Finally, the drive pushes deeper into the city center, where blue illuminated road markings and overhead digital displays dominate the towering architecture.
